type_match.definition: Whether the mention's inferred type matches the slot's expected type (1/0).
type_match.note: Requires slot type annotations; not computable from eval corpus alone.

operator_cue_match.definition: Whether operator cues (≤/≥/=) near the mention match the slot role.
operator_cue_match.note: Fraction of eval queries containing operator cues.

lower_cue_present.definition: Whether lower-bound language ('at least', 'minimum') precedes the mention.
lower_cue_present.note: Fraction of eval queries containing lower-bound cues.

upper_cue_present.definition: Whether upper-bound language ('at most', 'maximum') precedes the mention.
upper_cue_present.note: Fraction of eval queries containing upper-bound cues.

slot_mention_overlap.definition: Lexical overlap (Jaccard) between slot name tokens and mention context.
slot_mention_overlap.note: Requires slot names; not computable from eval corpus alone.

entity_match.definition: Whether an entity/name near the mention matches entity cues in the slot name.
entity_match.note: Fraction of eval queries containing entity/name cues.

sentence_proximity.definition: How close (in sentences) the mention is to the slot's description sentence.
sentence_proximity.note: Requires slot-sentence alignment; not computable from eval corpus alone.
